message:
fix(models): use effective_reasoning for SAP ad_hoc entries (bd-94u5z)

SAP AI Core ad_hoc model entries hardcoded reasoning: true, bypassing
per-model detection. Non-reasoning models (e.g. gpt-4o) deployed via
SAP would incorrectly have thinking enabled. Now uses
effective_reasoning() matching the generic ad_hoc path.

Also fix clippy unnecessary_wraps in doctor.rs check_extension.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
